rationale: The citing paper is explicitly described as a conceptual rejoinder that “responds to contemporaneous commentaries,” and the cited paper is itself a contemporaneous conceptual commentary on the same core question (how to integrate behavioral economics into marketing models). The metadata also shows both are 2006 JMR pieces in the same issue with adjacent pagination/DOIs (43(3):337 and 43(3):341), which suggests direct dialogue rather than a generic background mention.
